stemHtml: Each Contracting State shall ensure that passengers and their cabin baggage which have been screened are protected from unauthorised interference from the point of screening until they board their aircraft. If mixing or contact does take place, what considerations are to be made?

options.a: The passengers concerned, their cabin baggage and their checked baggage shall be re-screened before boarding the aircraft.
options.b: Only the cabin baggage shall be re-screened before boarding the aircraft.
options.c: The passengers concerned and their cabin baggage shall be re-screened before boarding the aircraft.
options.d: Only the passengers concerned shall be re-screened before boarding the aircraft.
